rationale.risk-routing: Learns an online policy to decide when actions require user check-in.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Enforces checkpoints, action-level approvals, and natural-language rules for the user.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Surfaces check-ins with clear explanations of triggers and trade-offs.
rationale.agent-scope-drift: Tracks agent workflow phases to restrict actions to the current stage.
rationale.survey-input: Formative survey yields preferences on agent oversight and interruption frequency.
rationale.framework: Architects a system separating policy-based gating from retrieval paths.
rationale.built-system: Implemented Hedwig as a functional CLI coding agent system.
